response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile-platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and knowledge sharing
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and systems programming with clear quality focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited demonstrated experience with mobile platform ecosystems (iOS/Android) as required
Role at Amazon listed as 'Founder' but appears to be a personal open-source project, not a corporate leadership role
